queries.question: Show podcasts and radio shows with 45-minute-long episodes.
queries.sql:
SELECT Audio_Media.title 
FROM Audio_Media JOIN Episode_Details ON Audio_Media.MediaID = Episode_Details.AudioMediaID
WHERE Audio_Media.Category = "Podcast" AND Episode_Details.Length = 45
UNION
SELECT Audio_Media.title 
FROM Audio_Media JOIN Episode_Details ON Audio_Media.MediaID = Episode_Details.AudioMediaID
WHERE Audio_Media.Category = "Radio Show" AND Episode_Details.Length = 45
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?audio_media a :Audio_Media .
    ?episode_details a :Episode_Details .
    ?episode_details p:hasAudio_Media ?audio_media .
    ?audio_media p:Title ?title .
    ?audio_media p:Category ?category_f .
    ?episode_details p:Length ?length_f .
    FILTER(STR(?category_f) = "Podcast")
    FILTER((STR(?length_f) = "45" || STR(?length_f) = "45.0"))
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?audio_media a :Audio_Media .
    ?episode_details a :Episode_Details .
    ?episode_details p:hasAudio_Media ?audio_media .
    ?audio_media p:Title ?title .
    ?audio_media p:Category ?category_f .
    ?episode_details p:Length ?length_f .
    FILTER(STR(?category_f) = "Radio Show")
    FILTER((STR(?length_f) = "45" || STR(?length_f) = "45.0"))
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
}
